# Sift Content Integrity: Stay Ahead of Spam and Scams

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Discover how Sift helps businesses proactively stop spam and scams from compromising customer data, surfaces risky messages automatically, and protects against phishing attempts. Read this one-pager to learn how Sift:

*   Surfaces suspicious messages across forums and other user-generated content to stop spam and scams
*   Protects against phishing attacks at scale
*   Significantly reduces manual review for trust and safety analysts

### Learn More

Download

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
